results.title: DIFFUSED BITLINE REPLACEMENT IN STACKED WAFER MEMORY
results.abstract: Techniques are disclosed herein for creating metal BLs in stacked wafer memory. Using techniques described herein, metal BLs are created on a bottom surface of a wafer.
